patches.purpose: Preserve an explicit 4 GiB Darwin ARM64 page-zero reservation without x86 Mach-O alignment overrides.
Retain and export the loader reservation marker so the installed native ARM64 wrapper does not re-exec.
Place Darwin ARM64 Wine mappings, KUSER backing, and TEB allocations above the loader reservation.
Use ARM64EC-safe atomics and fast-fail instructions instead of x86-only inline assembly.
Pass ARM64X mode to Wine's spec-object generator and select each PE target's Clang triple so native ARM64 metadata is preserved.
Require and directly link the exact native GEM bridge ABI, then synchronize Wine ntdll process, thread, memory, KUSER, protection, invalidation, and teardown lifecycle.
Replace Darwin ARM64 native guest entry with bounded GEM execution and explicit syscall, Unix-call, fault, exception, suspend, and termination boundaries.
Launch staged Darwin ARM64 builtins through a versioned in-process GEM contract, restore x18 at Wine syscall return, and make immediate process-exit teardown safe.
Synchronize post-fault protections per committed 4 KiB guest page and route native GEM thread suspension through a lock-free cooperative engine boundary.

Register validated mapped ARM64X images process-wide, route metadata redirections and helper SVC boundaries through GEM, preserve Wine syscall, callback, suspension, and return contracts, and suppress routine budget-slice trace spam.

Permit the packaged Darwin ARM64 launcher to complete native prefix file installation without the callback-heavy fake-DLL registry pass, while retaining manifest registration and leaving normal setupapi behavior unchanged.
Preserve the full in-flight ARM64EC/x64 GEM coordinator state across ordinary budget slices, and defer suspend publication until Wine's ARM64 syscall frame can represent the context without loss.
Classify ordinary AMD64 PE32+ startup separately from ARM64EC, load the shipped x86_64 ntdll, and route its syscall and Unix-call boundaries through native ARM64 GEM_x86_64 without Rosetta.

Add the i386 xtajit CPU surface backed by GEM, map the 32-bit guest address space through bounded high host shadow windows on Apple Silicon, and preserve context-changing syscall results such as NtContinue.

patchedOutcome.lastMilestone: fresh-prefix wineboot --init and cmd.exe /c exit completed through GEM

researchEvidence.acceptance: incremental evidence only; the clean build entrypoint owns the release gate
